overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2055 Term Treasury ETF (IBGL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE 2055 Maturity US Treasury index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds maturing between January and December 2055. The fund will terminate in December 2055. IBGL was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
